# Ishank Jha — Social Media & Brand Strategist

> Portfolio of Ishank Jha, a brand strategist and content architect who blends storytelling with analytics to build high-performing digital ecosystems for brands.

Ishank Jha leads brand strategy, social ecosystems, and creative direction for brands including The Trilight, Inside Out, Sri Aditya Vantage, Style Chai, The Commons by Incor, and GMR Hyderabad Airport.

- [Home](/): Overview, work, services, experience, skills, and contact.
